name: International Camera, Inc.
description_short: International Camera, Inc. is a credit repair provider based in Chicago, Illinois. Rated 4.0/5 with 71 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
International Camera, Inc. is a credit repair provider serving clients in Chicago, Illinois. Carrying a 4.0/5.0 Google rating from 71 reviews, International Camera, Inc. has an strong reputation among consumers in the Chicago area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

International Camera, Inc. specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Chicago, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. International Camera, Inc. operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Chicago, Illinois area who are considering International Camera, Inc. should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
